auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ZenRows API key used as the apikey query parameter for scraper requests and the X-API-Key header for usage lookup. Find or create it in your ZenRows Builder dashboard: https://app.zenrows.com/builder.

actions.name: extract_css
actions.description: Extract structured values from one public URL with ZenRows CSS selectors.

url.description: The public URL ZenRows should request.

js_render.description: Whether ZenRows should render JavaScript before returning the response.

wait.description: The time in milliseconds ZenRows should wait after page load before returning content.

wait_for.description: The CSS selector ZenRows should wait for before returning content.

premium_proxy.description: Whether ZenRows should use premium proxies for the request.

proxy_country.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for proxy geolocation. ZenRows requires premium_proxy when this is set.

session_id.description: The ZenRows session identifier used to keep the same IP across related requests.

additionalProperties.description: A custom header value sent to the target website.

custom_headers.description: Custom HTTP headers ZenRows should send to the target website.

additionalProperties.description: A CSS selector expression accepted by ZenRows.

css_selectors.description: CSS selectors ZenRows should extract, keyed by output field name.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for extracting CSS selector values with ZenRows.

additionalProperties.description: A value extracted by ZenRows for one selector.

data.description: The CSS extraction result returned by ZenRows.

status_code.description: The HTTP status code returned by ZenRows.

anyOf.description: The response content type returned by ZenRows.
The original target website status code reported by ZenRows.
The final URL reported by ZenRows after redirects.
The ZenRows request identifier when returned.
The maximum concurrent requests allowed for the API key when returned.
The remaining concurrent request slots when returned.

metadata.description: Metadata collected from ZenRows response headers.

headers.description: Response headers returned by ZenRows or the target website.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when extracting CSS selector values with ZenRows.

actions.name: fetch_html
actions.description: Fetch raw HTML from one public URL with optional JavaScript rendering and proxy controls.

url.description: The public URL ZenRows should request.

js_render.description: Whether ZenRows should render JavaScript before returning the response.

wait.description: The time in milliseconds ZenRows should wait after page load before returning content.

wait_for.description: The CSS selector ZenRows should wait for before returning content.

premium_proxy.description: Whether ZenRows should use premium proxies for the request.

proxy_country.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for proxy geolocation. ZenRows requires premium_proxy when this is set.

session_id.description: The ZenRows session identifier used to keep the same IP across related requests.

additionalProperties.description: A custom header value sent to the target website.

custom_headers.description: Custom HTTP headers ZenRows should send to the target website.

original_status.description: Whether ZenRows should expose the original target website status code.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching raw HTML with ZenRows.

html.description: The raw HTML content returned by ZenRows.

status_code.description: The HTTP status code returned by ZenRows.

anyOf.description: The response content type returned by ZenRows.
The original target website status code reported by ZenRows.
The final URL reported by ZenRows after redirects.
The ZenRows request identifier when returned.
The maximum concurrent requests allowed for the API key when returned.
The remaining concurrent request slots when returned.

metadata.description: Metadata collected from ZenRows response headers.

headers.description: Response headers returned by ZenRows or the target website.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching raw HTML with ZenRows.

actions.name: fetch_plaintext
actions.description: Fetch plain text extracted from one public URL with ZenRows.

url.description: The public URL ZenRows should request.

js_render.description: Whether ZenRows should render JavaScript before returning the response.

wait.description: The time in milliseconds ZenRows should wait after page load before returning content.

wait_for.description: The CSS selector ZenRows should wait for before returning content.

premium_proxy.description: Whether ZenRows should use premium proxies for the request.

proxy_country.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for proxy geolocation. ZenRows requires premium_proxy when this is set.

session_id.description: The ZenRows session identifier used to keep the same IP across related requests.

additionalProperties.description: A custom header value sent to the target website.

custom_headers.description: Custom HTTP headers ZenRows should send to the target website.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching plain text with ZenRows.

text.description: The plain text content returned by ZenRows.

status_code.description: The HTTP status code returned by ZenRows.

anyOf.description: The response content type returned by ZenRows.
The original target website status code reported by ZenRows.
The final URL reported by ZenRows after redirects.
The ZenRows request identifier when returned.
The maximum concurrent requests allowed for the API key when returned.
The remaining concurrent request slots when returned.

metadata.description: Metadata collected from ZenRows response headers.

headers.description: Response headers returned by ZenRows or the target website.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching plain text with ZenRows.

actions.name: get_usage
actions.description: Retrieve usage and plan details for the connected ZenRows API key.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving ZenRows usage details.

status.description: The current subscription status returned by ZenRows.

period_starts_at.description: The start date of the current usage period.

period_ends_at.description: The end date of the current usage period.

usage_percent.description: The usage percentage for the current period.

plan.description: The plan object returned by ZenRows usage details.

items.description: One top-up entry returned by ZenRows usage details.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving ZenRows usage details.
